member.name: T:MaxQueryPaymentExceededException
member.summary: Signals that a query will cost more than a pre-configured maximum payment amount.

member.name: F:MaxQueryPaymentExceededException.QueryCost
member.summary: The cost of the query that was attempted as returned by {@link Query#getCost(Client)}.

member.name: M:MaxQueryPaymentExceededException.#ctor(System.Type,Hbar,Hbar)
member.summary: The limit for a single automatic query payment, set by {@link Client#setDefaultMaxQueryPayment(Hbar)} (Hbar)} or {@link Query#setMaxQueryPayment(Hbar)}.
